channel.title: Coffee Recipes on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Coffee Recipes on Barista At Home

item.title: Coffee Syrup Recipes: Flavored Syrups for Every Coffee Drink
item.description: All the coffee syrups worth making at home — vanilla, lavender, caramel, hazelnut, brown sugar, pumpkin spice, and more. Plus the difference between coffee syrup (made from coffee) and flavored syrups for coffee.

item.title: Ginger Latte Recipe: How to Make a Homemade Ginger Latte
item.description: Make a homemade ginger latte with espresso, fresh ginger syrup, and steamed milk. Includes hot and iced versions, a honey ginger variation, and the difference between ginger and gingerbread lattes.

item.title: Butter Coffee: What It Is, How to Make It, and What the Research Actually Says
item.description: Butter coffee (bulletproof coffee) is coffee blended with grassfed butter and MCT oil. Here's the recipe, the science, and honest answers to whether it actually works.
